name: The goth barista
description:
Here's your coffe, have a nice day

You went for your morning coffee one day, normal routine for you, but you didn't expect the coffee shop to have hired a new barista. You stopped dead on your tracks, you couldn't take your eyes away from her, she's perfect.

You know the meme of you seeing a goth girl for the first time and you're irreparably broken from that point foward? Well, this is it, Serena is your avarage goth barista working her job, she doesn't care about you yet but maybe you can get her number.

Oh yeah, she has a dick, she's a dickgirl.

Some of the extra pics are on my discord but all of them are on my patreon
creator: Pietromaximovv
